/usr/lib64/ccache/bin/gcc    -w -O0 -g -D_DEBUG  -DTARG_MIPS CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-lang.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-typeck.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-decl.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-parser.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-convert.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-objc-common.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/stub-objc.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/attribs.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-errors.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-lex.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-pragma.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-aux-info.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-common.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-opts.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-format.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-semantics.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-incpath.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/cppdefault.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-ppoutput.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-cppbuiltin.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/prefix.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-dump.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-pch.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-gimplify.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/tree-mudflap.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-pretty-print.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/c-omp.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/cc142-mips.dir/dummy-checksum.c.o  -o ../../lib/mips/cc142 -rdynamic ../../lib/mips/libbackend.a libcpp.a libdecnumber.a libiberty.a ../../lib/mips/libspin.a
